text: ABSTRACT ChatGPT is a new AI model that has emerged as a rapid evolution of existing natural language processing (NLP) technology provided by OpenAI. Based on the highly powerful GPT-3 (third-generation) deep learning architecture, the AI model can sustain a conversation using context and providing differentiated responses in various language styles. This overview looks into the ChatGPT model based on the machine learning and neural network technology, and lists its highlights and advantages such as high automation efficiency, high conversation accuracy, and tremendous cost reduction. Meanwhile, this chapter also analyzes the challenges of adopting the ChatGPT, including resisting attacks, spreading misinformation, containing built-in bias, and addressing limitations of external information query and update in real time. It is reasonable to believe that the ChatGPT is a revolutionary technological breakthrough in the field of AI communication, while resisting attacks and improving its service functionality is key to commercial applications in the future.
